title: ASTS Analyst Forecasts and Price Targets for 2026-2028
text: Analysts forecast ASTS revenue for 2026 of $150-200 million per company guidance with ranges from $63.2-99.1 billion across 16 Wall Street analysts. For 2027, 15 Wall Street analysts forecast ASTS revenue of $331.97 billion on average, with the lowest forecast at $198.79 billion and the highest at $698.32 billion. In 2028, ASTS is forecast to generate $704.44 billion in revenue, with the lowest forecast at $463.38 billion and highest at $1.028 trillion. Analysts on Wall Street do not forecast AST achieving positive net income until 2028, the same year annual revenue is expected to reach $1.6 billion. The wide range in analyst forecasts reflects uncertainty about adoption rates and commercial viability. However, the general consensus shows significant revenue growth expected as satellite deployments increase and partnerships with major carriers generate revenue. Price target consensus indicates a 12-month stock price target of $69.6, representing a 14.07% decrease from May 2026 levels.
